*/\n    function setTokenizer(address newTokenizer) external onlyOwner {\n        if (newTokenizer == address(0)) revert InvalidTokenContractAddress();\n        address prev = tokenizer;\n        tokenizer = newTokenizer;\n        emit TokenizerUpdated(prev, newTokenizer);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Registers a new real-world asset. Owner-only; deduplicated by content hash.\n     * @param assetOwner Address of the asset owner.\n     * @param assetName Human-readable name.\n     * @param assetCategory Category (e.g. \"Real Estate\").\n     * @param metadataURI URI for off-chain documentation.\n     * @param valuation USD valuation (6 decimals).\n     * @param model WHOLE_OWNERSHIP or FRACTIONAL.\n     * @return assetId Assigned asset identifier.\n     */\n    function registerAsset(\n        address assetOwner,\n        string calldata assetName,\n        string calldata assetCategory,\n        string calldata metadataURI,\n        uint128 valuation,\n        OwnershipModel model\n    ) external onlyOwner whenNotPaused nonReentrant returns (uint256 assetId) {\n        if (assetOwner == address(0)) revert UnauthorizedCaller(address(0));\n        if (bytes(assetName).length == 0) revert EmptyStringField(\"assetName\");\n        if (bytes(assetCategory).length == 0) revert EmptyStringField(\"assetCategory\");\n        if (bytes(metadataURI).length == 0) revert EmptyStringField(\"metadataURI\");\n        if (valuation == 0) revert InvalidValuation(0);\n\n        bytes32 guard = keccak256(abi.encodePacked(assetName, assetCategory, metadataURI, assetOwner));\n        if (_registrationGuard[guard]) revert AssetAlreadyRegistered(0);\n\n        assetId = _assetCounter++;\n        _registrationGuard[guard] = true;\n\n        AssetRecord storage rec = _assets[assetId];\n        rec.assetId = assetId;\n        rec.assetOwner = assetOwner;\n        rec.state = AssetState.PENDING;\n        rec.model = model;\n        rec.registeredAt = uint48(block.timestamp);\n        rec.valuation = valuation;\n        rec.assetName = assetName;\n        rec.assetCategory = assetCategory;\n        rec.metadataURI = metadataURI;\n\n        _ownerAssets[assetOwner].push(assetId);\n        emit AssetRegistered(assetId, assetOwner, assetName, assetCategory, valuation, model);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Transitions an asset from PENDING \u2192 ACTIVE, enabling investment.\n     * @param assetId Asset identifier to approve.\n     */\n    function approveAsset(uint256 assetId) external onlyOwner whenNotPaused assetExists(assetId) {\n        AssetRecord storage rec = _assets[assetId];\n        _requireTransition(assetId, rec.state, AssetState.ACTIVE);\n        rec.state = AssetState.ACTIVE;\n        emit AssetApproved(assetId, msg.sender);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Links an ERC20 to a FRACTIONAL asset and marks it TOKENIZED. Tokenizer-only.\n     * @param assetId Asset to mark as tokenized.\n     * @param tokenContract Deployed fractional ERC20 address.\n     * @param totalShares Total ERC20 supply for this round.\n     * @param pricePerShare Price per share in payment token units.\n     */\n    function recordTokenization(\n        uint256 assetId,\n        address tokenContract,\n        uint128 totalShares,\n        uint128 pricePerShare\n    ) external onlyTokenizer whenNotPaused assetExists(assetId) {\n        AssetRecord storage rec = _assets[assetId];\n\n        if (rec.model != OwnershipModel.FRACTIONAL) revert OwnershipModelMismatch(assetId, rec.model);\n        if (rec.state != AssetState.ACTIVE && rec.state != AssetState.RELISTED)\n            revert AssetNotActiveForTokenization(assetId, rec.state);\n        if (tokenContract == address(0)) revert InvalidTokenContractAddress();\n        if (totalShares == 0) revert InvalidShareSupply(0);\n        if (pricePerShare == 0) revert InvalidTokenPrice(0);\n\n        rec.state = AssetState.TOKENIZED;\n        rec.tokenContract = tokenContract;\n        rec.totalShares = totalShares;\n        rec.pricePerShare = pricePerShare;\n        rec.tokenizedAt = uint48(block.timestamp);\n\n        emit AssetTokenized(assetId, tokenContract, totalShares, pricePerShare);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Increments the sold-share counter for a fractional asset. Tokenizer-only.\n     * @param assetId Asset receiving the purchase.\n     * @param sharesDelta Number of shares just purchased.\n     */\n    function recordSharesSold(uint256 assetId, uint128 sharesDelta) external onlyTokenizer assetExists(assetId) {\n        if (sharesDelta == 0) revert InvalidShareSupply(0);\n\n        AssetRecord storage rec = _assets[assetId];\n        uint128 updated = rec.soldShares + sharesDelta;\n        rec.soldShares = updated;\n\n        emit SoldSharesUpdated(assetId, updated);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Marks an asset as CLOSED. Callable by owner or tokenizer.\n     * @param assetId Asset identifier to close.\n     */\n    function closeAsset(uint256 assetId) external whenNotPaused assetExists(assetId) {\n        if (msg.sender != owner() && msg.sender != tokenizer) revert UnauthorizedCaller(msg.sender);\n\n        AssetRecord storage rec = _assets[assetId];\n\n        if (rec.state == AssetState.PENDING || rec.state == AssetState.CLOSED)\n            revert InvalidStateTransition(assetId, rec.state, AssetState.CLOSED);\n\n        rec.state = AssetState.CLOSED;\n        emit AssetClosed(assetId, msg.sender);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Updates registered assetOwner when full ownership transfers. Tokenizer-only; call before relistAsset.\n     * @param assetId Asset whose ownership is transferring.\n     * @param newOwner New full owner address.\n     */\n    function transferAssetOwnership(\n        uint256 assetId,\n        address newOwner\n    ) external onlyTokenizer whenNotPaused assetExists(assetId) {\n        if (newOwner == address(0)) revert InvalidNewOwnerAddress();\n\n        AssetRecord storage rec = _assets[assetId];\n        address previousOwner = rec.assetOwner;\n        if (previousOwner == newOwner) return;\n\n        rec.assetOwner = newOwner;\n        _ownerAssets[newOwner].push(assetId);\n        emit AssetOwnershipTransferred(assetId, previousOwner, newOwner);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Transitions a CLOSED FRACTIONAL asset to RELISTED for a fresh offering round. Tokenizer-only.\n     * @dev Resets soldShares, totalShares, pricePerShare, tokenizedAt; sets valuation and metadataURI. Increments relistCount.\n     * @param assetId Asset to relist (must be CLOSED).\n     * @param newValuation USD valuation for the new round.\n     * @param newMetadataURI URI for fresh legal/valuation docs.\n     */\n    function relistAsset(\n        uint256 assetId,\n        uint128 newValuation,\n        string calldata newMetadataURI\n    ) external onlyTokenizer whenNotPaused assetExists(assetId) {\n        if (newValuation == 0) revert InvalidValuation(0);\n        if (bytes(newMetadataURI).length == 0) revert EmptyStringField(\"metadataURI\");\n\n        AssetRecord storage rec = _assets[assetId];\n        if (rec.state != AssetState.CLOSED) revert AssetNotClosedForRelisting(assetId, rec.state);\n        if (rec.model != OwnershipModel.FRACTIONAL) revert OwnershipModelMismatch(assetId, rec.model);\n\n        rec.state = AssetState.RELISTED;\n        rec.valuation = newValuation;\n        rec.metadataURI = newMetadataURI;\n        rec.soldShares = 0;\n        rec.totalShares = 0;\n        rec.pricePerShare = 0;\n        rec.tokenizedAt = 0;\n        uint32 newCount = rec.relistCount + 1;\n        rec.relistCount = newCount;\n        rec.relistedAt = uint48(block.timestamp);\n\n        emit AssetRelisted(assetId, rec.assetOwner, newValuation, newCount);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Returns the full canonical record for a given asset.\n     * @param assetId Identifier of the asset to retrieve.\n     * @return rec Complete AssetRecord struct.\n     */\n    function getAsset(uint256 assetId) external view assetExists(assetId) returns (AssetRecord memory rec) {\n        rec = _assets[assetId];\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Returns all asset IDs ever associated with an owner (includes historical).\n     * @param assetOwner Owner address to query.\n     * @return ids Array of asset IDs.\n     */\n    function getAssetsByOwner(address assetOwner) external view returns (uint256[] memory ids) {\n        ids = _ownerAssets[assetOwner];\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Returns the current state of an asset.\n     * @param assetId Asset identifier to query.\n     * @return Current AssetState enum value.\n     */\n    function getAssetState(uint256 assetId) external view assetExists(assetId) returns (AssetState) {\n        return _assets[assetId].state;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Returns funding progress for the current offering round (reset on relist).\n     * @param assetId Asset to query.\n     * @return soldShares Shares purchased in this round.\n     * @return totalShares Total shares in this round.\n     */\n    function getFundingProgress(\n        uint256 assetId\n    ) external view assetExists(assetId) returns (uint128 soldShares, uint128 totalShares) {\n        AssetRecord storage rec = _assets[assetId];\n        soldShares = rec.soldShares;\n        totalShares = rec.totalShares;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Returns how many times the asset has been relisted (0 = original round).\n     * @param assetId Asset to query.\n     * @return count Relist count.\n     */\n    function getRelistCount(uint256 assetId) external view assetExists(assetId) returns (uint32 count) {\n        count = _assets[assetId].relistCount;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Returns the total number of assets ever registered.\n     * @return count Total registered asset count (all states).\n     */\n    function totalAssets() external view returns (uint256 count) {\n        count = _assetCounter - 1;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Enforces valid FSM transitions; reverts with InvalidStateTransition otherwise.\n     * @param assetId Asset id (for revert payload).\n     * @param current Current state.\n     * @param requested Requested next state.\n     */\n    function _requireTransition(uint256 assetId, AssetState current, AssetState requested) internal pure {\n        bool valid;\n        if (current == AssetState.PENDING && requested == AssetState.ACTIVE) valid = true;\n        if (current == AssetState.ACTIVE && requested == AssetState.TOKENIZED) valid = true;\n        if (current == AssetState.ACTIVE && requested == AssetState.CLOSED) valid = true;\n        if (current == AssetState.TOKENIZED && requested == AssetState.CLOSED) valid = true;\n        if (current == AssetState.CLOSED && requested == AssetState.RELISTED) valid = true;\n        if (current == AssetState.RELISTED && requested == AssetState.TOKENIZED) valid = true;\n\n        if (!valid) revert InvalidStateTransition(assetId, current, requested);\n    }\n\n    /////////////////////////////////////////\n    //////// OZ Natives /////////////////////\n    /////////////////////////////////////////\n    /**\n     * @dev UUPS hook; restricts upgrades to owner.\n     * @param newImplementation New implementation contract address.\n     */\n    function _authorizeUpgrade(address newImplementation) internal override onlyOwner {}\n\n    /// @notice Pauses all state-changing operations. Emergency circuit breaker.\n    function pause() external onlyOwner {\n        _pause();\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Restores normal operation after a pause.\n    function unpause() external onlyOwner {\n        _unpause();\n    }\n}\n","keccak256":"0xc4bf112022f60af79fab423670ba0cff6928d5cfb088bdacef22664fb8f84f81","license":"MIT"},"contracts/modules/FractionalOwnershipToken.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\npragma solidity ^0.8.24;\n\nimport { UUPSUpgradeable } from \"@openzeppelin/contracts-upgradeable/proxy/utils/UUPSUpgradeable.sol\";\nimport { Initializable } from \"@openzeppelin/contracts-upgradeable/proxy/utils/Initializable.sol\";\nimport { OwnableUpgradeable } from \"@openzeppelin/contracts-upgradeable/access/OwnableUpgradeable.sol\";\nimport { ReentrancyGuard } from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/ReentrancyGuard.sol\";\nimport { ERC20Upgradeable } from \"@openzeppelin/contracts-upgradeable/token/ERC20/ERC20Upgradeable.sol\";\nimport { ERC20PausableUpgradeable } from \"@openzeppelin/contracts-upgradeable/token/ERC20/extensions/ERC20PausableUpgradeable.sol\";\n\n/**\n * @title VaulticFractionalOwnershipToken\n * @author @0xJonaseb11\n * @notice Upgradeable ERC20 representing fractional ownership of a single RWA in the Vaultic Trust protocol.\n * @dev One proxy per tokenized asset; full supply minted at init to InvestmentManager. Decimals 0 (whole shares). UUPS, pausable.\n */\ncontract VaulticFractionalOwnershipToken is\n    Initializable,\n    ERC20Upgradeable,\n    ERC20PausableUpgradeable,\n    OwnableUpgradeable,\n    ReentrancyGuard,\n    UUPSUpgradeable\n{\n    error UnauthorizedMinter(address caller);\n    error InsufficientTokenBalance(uint256 requested, uint256 available);\n    error InvalidRecipient();\n    error ZeroShareDispatch();\n    error InvalidInitialSupply();\n    error InvalidAssetId();\n    error NothingToReclaim();\n\n    event SupplyMinted(uint256 indexed assetId, address indexed recipient, uint256 supply);\n    event SharesDispatched(uint256 indexed assetId, address indexed investor, uint256 amount);\n    event AllSharesReclaimed(uint256 indexed assetId, uint256 totalReclaimed);\n    event MinterUpdated(address indexed previous, address indexed updated);\n\n    uint256 public assetId;\n    address public authorizedMinter;\n    string public assetName;\n    uint256[50] private __gap;\n\n    modifier onlyMinter() {\n        if (msg.sender != authorizedMinter) revert UnauthorizedMinter(msg.sender);\n        _;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Initializes the token proxy for a specific RWA. Mints full supply to initialHolder; supply is fixed thereafter.\n     * @param _assetId Registry identifier for the underlying asset.\n     * @param _assetName Human-readable asset name (used in token name).\n     * @param _totalSupply Number of indivisible share tokens to mint.\n     * @param _initialHolder Address receiving all minted shares (e.g. InvestmentManager).\n     * @param _authorizedMinter Address permitted to dispatch and reclaim shares.\n     * @param _owner Protocol owner for upgrade and admin.\n     */\n    function initialize(\n        uint256 _assetId,\n        string calldata _assetName,\n        uint256 _totalSupply,\n        address _initialHolder,\n        address _authorizedMinter,\n        address _owner\n    ) external initializer {\n        if (_assetId == 0) revert InvalidAssetId();\n        if (_totalSupply == 0) revert InvalidInitialSupply();\n        if (_initialHolder == address(0)) revert InvalidRecipient();\n        if (_authorizedMinter == address(0)) revert UnauthorizedMinter(address(0));\n\n        string memory tokenName = string(abi.encodePacked(\"Vaultic: \", _assetName));\n        string memory tokenSymbol = string(abi.encodePacked(\"VLT-\", _uint256ToString(_assetId)));\n\n        __ERC20_init(tokenName, tokenSymbol);\n        __ERC20Pausable_init();\n        __Ownable_init(_owner);\n\n        assetId = _assetId;\n        assetName = _assetName;\n        authorizedMinter = _authorizedMinter;\n\n        _mint(_initialHolder, _totalSupply);\n\n        emit SupplyMinted(_assetId, _initialHolder, _totalSupply);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Transfers shares from the minter's balance to an investor. Minter-only.\n     * @param investor Destination address for the dispatched shares.\n     * @param amount Number of shares to send.\n     */\n    function dispatchShares(address investor, uint256 amount) external onlyMinter nonReentrant whenNotPaused {\n        if (investor == address(0)) revert InvalidRecipient();\n        if (amount == 0) revert ZeroShareDispatch();\n\n        uint256 available = balanceOf(msg.sender);\n        if (amount > available) revert InsufficientTokenBalance(amount, available);\n\n        _transfer(msg.sender, investor, amount);\n\n        emit SharesDispatched(assetId, investor, amount);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Pulls all outstanding shares from the given holders back to the minter (for relisting). Minter-only.\n     * @param holders Array of addresses that currently hold shares (supplied by InvestmentManager).\n     * @return reclaimed Total number of shares pulled back to the minter.\n     */\n    function reclaimAllShares(\n        address[] calldata holders\n    ) external onlyMinter nonReentrant whenNotPaused returns (uint256 reclaimed) {\n        uint256 minterBalance = balanceOf(msg.sender);\n        uint256 supply = totalSupply();\n        if (minterBalance == supply) revert NothingToReclaim();\n\n        address minter = msg.sender;\n        uint256 len = holders.length;\n\n        for (uint256 i; i < len; ) {\n            address holder = holders[i];\n            uint256 balance = balanceOf(holder);\n            if (balance != 0) {\n                _transfer(holder, minter, balance);\n                reclaimed += balance;\n            }\n\n            unchecked {\n                ++i;\n            }\n        }\n\n        emit AllSharesReclaimed(assetId, reclaimed);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Reassigns the authorized minter. Owner-only (e.g. when upgrading InvestmentManager).\n     * @param newMinter New address to grant minter role.\n     */\n    function setAuthorizedMinter(address newMinter) external onlyOwner {\n        if (newMinter == address(0)) revert UnauthorizedMinter(address(0));\n        address prev = authorizedMinter;\n        authorizedMinter = newMinter;\n        emit MinterUpdated(prev, newMinter);\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Pauses all token transfers.\n    function pause() external onlyOwner {\n        _pause();\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Restores normal token transfer functionality.\n    function unpause() external onlyOwner {\n        _unpause();\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Returns the number of decimal places (0 \u2014 whole shares only).\n     * @return 0 always.\n     */\n    function decimals() public pure override returns (uint8) {\n        return 0;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Returns shares still held by the minter (undispatched).\n     * @return remaining Balance of authorizedMinter.\n     */\n    function remainingShares() external view returns (uint256 remaining) {\n        remaining = balanceOf(authorizedMinter);\n    }\n\n    /// @dev Resolves ERC20Upgradeable / ERC20PausableUpgradeable inheritance; enforces pause on transfer.\n    function _update(\n        address from,\n        address to,\n        uint256 value\n    ) internal override(ERC20Upgradeable, ERC20PausableUpgradeable) {\n        super._update(from, to, value);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev UUPS hook; restricts upgrades to owner.\n     * @param newImplementation New implementation contract address.\n     */\n    function _authorizeUpgrade(address newImplementation) internal override onlyOwner {}\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Converts uint256 to decimal string (for token symbol at init).\n     * @param value The integer to convert.\n     * @return str Decimal string representation.\n     */\n    function _uint256ToString(uint256 value) internal pure returns (string memory str) {\n        if (value == 0) return \"0\";\n\n        uint256 temp = value;\n        uint256 digits;\n        while (temp != 0) {\n            digits++;\n            temp /= 10;\n        }\n\n        bytes memory buffer = new bytes(digits);\n        while (value != 0) {\n            digits--;\n            buffer[digits] = bytes1(uint8(48 + (value % 10)));\n            value /= 10;\n        }\n        str = string(buffer);\n    }\n}\n","keccak256":"0x9c4838bc90108603f2979e2a224f20c6d2fe09f5dcabdb4cf284e62fa9525f6a","license":"MIT"},"contracts/modules/InvestmentManager.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\npragma solidity ^0.8.24;\n\nimport { UUPSUpgradeable } from \"@openzeppelin/contracts-upgradeable/proxy/utils/UUPSUpgradeable.sol\";\nimport { Initializable } from \"@openzeppelin/contracts-upgradeable/proxy/utils/Initializable.sol\";\nimport { OwnableUpgradeable } from \"@openzeppelin/contracts-upgradeable/access/OwnableUpgradeable.sol\";\nimport { PausableUpgradeable } from \"@openzeppelin/contracts-upgradeable/utils/PausableUpgradeable.sol\";\nimport { ReentrancyGuard } from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/ReentrancyGuard.sol\";\nimport { IERC20 } from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/IERC20.sol\";\nimport { SafeERC20 } from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/utils/SafeERC20.sol\";\n\nimport { VaulticAssetRegistry } from \"../core/VaultAssetRegistry.sol\";\nimport { VaulticFractionalOwnershipToken } from \"./FractionalOwnershipToken.sol\";\n\n/**\n * @title VaulticInvestmentManager\n * @author @0xJonaseb11\n * @notice Orchestrates fractional asset tokenization, purchases, proceeds, and full-owner relisting. Holds TOKENIZER_ROLE on the registry.\n * @dev Payments in ERC20 stablecoin. ReentrancyGuard, SafeERC20, pull-over-push withdrawals. UUPS upgradeable, pausable.\n */\ncontract VaulticInvestmentManager is\n    Initializable,\n    OwnableUpgradeable,\n    PausableUpgradeable,\n    ReentrancyGuard,\n    UUPSUpgradeable\n{\n    using SafeERC20 for IERC20;\n\n    error UnauthorizedCaller(address caller);\n    error AssetNotEligibleForTokenization(uint256 assetId);\n    error AssetNotOpenForInvestment(uint256 assetId);\n    error ZeroPurchaseAmount();\n    error InsufficientSharesAvailable(uint256 requested, uint256 available);\n    error PaymentMismatch(uint256 expected, uint256 provided);\n    error InvalidShareSupply();\n    error InvalidPricePerShare();\n    error ZeroAddressArgument(string field);\n    error InvestorCapExceeded(uint256 assetId, address investor, uint256 cap, uint256 requested);\n    error NoProceeds(uint256 assetId);\n    error NotAssetOwner(uint256 assetId, address caller);\n    error FeeBpsExceedsMaximum(uint256 provided, uint256 maximum);\n    error CallerDoesNotHoldFullSupply(uint256 assetId, address caller, uint256 balance, uint256 supply);\n    error AssetNotClosedForRelisting(uint256 assetId);\n\n    uint256 private constant BPS_DENOMINATOR = 10_000;\n    uint256 private constant MAX_FEE_BPS = 1_000;\n\n    /// @notice Per-asset investment pool state for the current offering round (reset on relist).\n    struct AssetInvestmentPool {\n        uint128 totalShares;\n        uint128 soldShares;\n        uint128 pricePerShare;\n        uint128 investorCap;\n        address tokenContract;\n        bool isFullySubscribed;\n        uint256 proceedsCollected;\n        uint256 proceedsWithdrawn;\n    }\n\n    event AssetTokenized(\n        uint256 indexed assetId,\n        address indexed tokenContract,\n        uint128 totalShares,\n        uint128 pricePerShare\n    );\n    event FractionPurchased(\n        uint256 indexed assetId,\n        address indexed investor,\n        uint256 shareAmount,\n        uint256 paymentAmount,\n        uint256 feeTaken\n    );\n    event OfferingFullySubscribed(uint256 indexed assetId, uint256 totalProceeds);\n    event ProceedsWithdrawn(uint256 indexed assetId, address indexed recipient, uint256 amount);\n    event AssetRelisted(\n        uint256 indexed assetId,\n        address indexed newOwner,\n        uint128 newTotalShares,\n        uint128 newPricePerShare,\n        uint32 relistCount\n    );\n    event FeesSweptToTreasury(address indexed treasury, uint256 amount);\n    event ProtocolFeeUpdated(uint256 previousBps, uint256 newBps);\n    event TokenImplementationUpdated(address indexed previous, address indexed updated);\n\n    VaulticAssetRegistry public registry;\n    IERC20 public paymentToken;\n    address public tokenImplementation;\n    uint256 public protocolFeeBps;\n    address public feeTreasury;\n    uint256 public accumulatedFees;\n    mapping(uint256 => AssetInvestmentPool) private _pools;\n    mapping(uint256 => mapping(address => uint256)) public investorHoldings;\n    mapping(uint256 => address[]) private _investorList;\n    uint256[50] private __gap;\n\n    modifier poolExists(uint256 assetId) {\n        if (_pools[assetId].tokenContract == address(0)) revert AssetNotOpenForInvestment(assetId);\n        _;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Initializes the upgradeable proxy.\n     * @param _registry VaulticAssetRegistry proxy address.\n     * @param _paymentToken ERC20 used for investment payments.\n     * @param _tokenImplementation VaulticFractionalOwnershipToken implementation address.\n     * @param _feeTreasury Treasury address for fee sweeps.\n     * @param _protocolFeeBps Protocol fee in basis points (e.g. 50 = 0.5%).\n     * @param _owner Protocol owner.\n     */\n    function initialize(\n        address _registry,\n        address _paymentToken,\n        address _tokenImplementation,\n        address _feeTreasury,\n        uint256 _protocolFeeBps,\n        address _owner\n    ) external initializer {\n        if (_registry == address(0)) revert ZeroAddressArgument(\"registry\");\n        if (_paymentToken == address(0)) revert ZeroAddressArgument(\"paymentToken\");\n        if (_tokenImplementation == address(0)) revert ZeroAddressArgument(\"tokenImplementation\");\n        if (_feeTreasury == address(0)) revert ZeroAddressArgument(\"feeTreasury\");\n        if (_protocolFeeBps > MAX_FEE_BPS) revert FeeBpsExceedsMaximum(_protocolFeeBps, MAX_FEE_BPS);\n\n        __Ownable_init(_owner);\n        __Pausable_init();\n\n        registry = VaulticAssetRegistry(_registry);\n        paymentToken = IERC20(_paymentToken);\n        tokenImplementation = _tokenImplementation;\n        feeTreasury = _feeTreasury;\n        protocolFeeBps = _protocolFeeBps;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Deploys a fractional ownership token proxy for an ACTIVE FRACTIONAL asset and records it on the registry. Owner-only.\n     * @param assetId Registry identifier of the asset to tokenize.\n     * @param totalShares Total fractional shares to mint.\n     * @param pricePerShare Payment token units per share.\n     * @param investorCap Max shares per investor (0 = uncapped).\n     * @return tokenProxy Address of the deployed token proxy.\n     */\n    function tokenizeAsset(\n        uint256 assetId,\n        uint128 totalShares,\n        uint128 pricePerShare,\n        uint128 investorCap\n    ) external onlyOwner whenNotPaused nonReentrant returns (address tokenProxy) {\n        if (totalShares == 0) revert InvalidShareSupply();\n        if (pricePerShare == 0) revert InvalidPricePerShare();\n\n        VaulticAssetRegistry.AssetRecord memory rec = registry.getAsset(assetId);\n\n        if (rec.state != VaulticAssetRegistry.AssetState.ACTIVE) revert AssetNotEligibleForTokenization(assetId);\n\n        if (rec.model != VaulticAssetRegistry.OwnershipModel.FRACTIONAL)\n            revert AssetNotEligibleForTokenization(assetId);\n\n        tokenProxy = _deployTokenProxy();\n\n        VaulticFractionalOwnershipToken(tokenProxy).initialize(\n            assetId,\n            rec.assetName,\n            totalShares,\n            address(this), // initial holder: InvestmentManager holds all shares\n            address(this), // authorizedMinter: InvestmentManager dispatches shares\n            owner()\n        );\n\n        AssetInvestmentPool storage pool = _pools[assetId];\n        pool.totalShares = totalShares;\n        pool.pricePerShare = pricePerShare;\n        pool.investorCap = investorCap;\n        pool.tokenContract = tokenProxy;\n\n        registry.recordTokenization(assetId, tokenProxy, totalShares, pricePerShare);\n\n        emit AssetTokenized(assetId, tokenProxy, totalShares, pricePerShare);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Purchases fractional shares of a TOKENIZED asset. paymentAmount must equal shareAmount \u00d7 pricePerShare.\n     * @param assetId Registry identifier of the asset.\n     * @param shareAmount Number of shares to purchase.\n     * @param paymentAmount Gross payment in payment token units (must equal shareAmount \u00d7 pricePerShare).\n     */\n    function purchaseShares(\n        uint256 assetId,\n        uint256 shareAmount,\n        uint256 paymentAmount\n    ) external whenNotPaused nonReentrant poolExists(assetId) {\n        if (shareAmount == 0) revert ZeroPurchaseAmount();\n\n        AssetInvestmentPool storage pool = _pools[assetId];\n\n        if (pool.isFullySubscribed) revert AssetNotOpenForInvestment(assetId);\n\n        uint256 remaining = pool.totalShares - pool.soldShares;\n        if (shareAmount > remaining) revert InsufficientSharesAvailable(shareAmount, remaining);\n\n        if (pool.investorCap != 0) {\n            uint256 current = investorHoldings[assetId][msg.sender];\n            if (current + shareAmount > pool.investorCap)\n                revert InvestorCapExceeded(assetId, msg.sender, pool.investorCap, shareAmount);\n        }\n\n        uint256 grossCost = uint256(pool.pricePerShare) * shareAmount;\n        if (paymentAmount != grossCost) revert PaymentMismatch(grossCost, paymentAmount);\n\n        uint256 fee = (grossCost * protocolFeeBps) / BPS_DENOMINATOR;\n        uint256 netCost = grossCost - fee;\n\n        pool.soldShares += uint128(shareAmount);\n        pool.proceedsCollected += netCost;\n        accumulatedFees += fee;\n\n        if (investorHoldings[assetId][msg.sender] == 0) {\n            _investorList[assetId].push(msg.sender);\n        }\n        investorHoldings[assetId][msg.sender] += shareAmount;\n\n        bool fullySub = pool.soldShares == pool.totalShares;\n        if (fullySub) pool.isFullySubscribed = true;\n\n        paymentToken.safeTransferFrom(msg.sender, address(this), grossCost);\n\n        VaulticFractionalOwnershipToken(pool.tokenContract).dispatchShares(msg.sender, shareAmount);\n\n        registry.recordSharesSold(assetId, uint128(shareAmount));\n\n        emit FractionPurchased(assetId, msg.sender, shareAmount, grossCost, fee);\n\n        if (fullySub) {\n            registry.closeAsset(assetId);\n            emit OfferingFullySubscribed(assetId, pool.proceedsCollected);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Lets full owner (100% ERC20 supply) relist a CLOSED asset for a new round. Atomic: verify, reclaim, transfer ownership, relist, record tokenization, reset pool.\n     * @param assetId Registry identifier of the CLOSED asset.\n     * @param newTotalShares Total share supply for the new round.\n     * @param newPricePerShare Price per share for the new round.\n     * @param newValuation Updated USD valuation for the new round.\n     * @param newMetadataURI URI for fresh legal/valuation docs.\n     * @param newInvestorCap Per-investor cap for the new round (0 = uncapped).\n     */\n    function relistAsset(\n        uint256 assetId,\n        uint128 newTotalShares,\n        uint128 newPricePerShare,\n        uint128 newValuation,\n        string calldata newMetadataURI,\n        uint128 newInvestorCap\n    ) external whenNotPaused nonReentrant poolExists(assetId) {\n        if (newTotalShares == 0) revert InvalidShareSupply();\n        if (newPricePerShare == 0) revert InvalidPricePerShare();\n\n        VaulticAssetRegistry.AssetRecord memory rec = registry.getAsset(assetId);\n        if (rec.state != VaulticAssetRegistry.AssetState.CLOSED) revert AssetNotClosedForRelisting(assetId);\n\n        VaulticFractionalOwnershipToken token = VaulticFractionalOwnershipToken(_pools[assetId].tokenContract);\n        uint256 supply = token.totalSupply();\n        uint256 callerBalance = token.balanceOf(msg.sender);\n\n        if (callerBalance != supply) revert CallerDoesNotHoldFullSupply(assetId, msg.sender, callerBalance, supply);\n\n        AssetInvestmentPool storage pool = _pools[assetId];\n        pool.totalShares = newTotalShares;\n        pool.soldShares = 0;\n        pool.pricePerShare = newPricePerShare;\n        pool.investorCap = newInvestorCap;\n        pool.isFullySubscribed = false;\n        pool.proceedsCollected = 0;\n        pool.proceedsWithdrawn = 0;\n\n        address[] storage investors = _investorList[assetId];\n        uint256 investorCount = investors.length;\n\n        for (uint256 i; i < investorCount; ) {\n            investorHoldings[assetId][investors[i]] = 0;\n            unchecked {\n                ++i;\n            }\n        }\n\n        delete _investorList[assetId];\n\n        address[] memory reclaimList;\n        if (investorCount > 0) {\n            reclaimList = new address[](investorCount + 1);\n            for (uint256 i; i < investorCount; ) {\n                reclaimList[i] = investors[i];\n                unchecked {\n                    ++i;\n                }\n            }\n            reclaimList[investorCount] = msg.sender;\n        } else {\n            reclaimList = new address[](1);\n            reclaimList[0] = msg.sender;\n        }\n\n        token.reclaimAllShares(reclaimList);\n        registry.transferAssetOwnership(assetId, msg.sender);\n        registry.relistAsset(assetId, newValuation, newMetadataURI);\n        registry.recordTokenization(assetId, address(token), newTotalShares, newPricePerShare);\n\n        uint32 relistCount = registry.getRelistCount(assetId);\n\n        emit AssetRelisted(assetId, msg.sender, newTotalShares, newPricePerShare, relistCount);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Withdraws accumulated net proceeds for the registered asset owner. Pull-over-push; current round only.\n     * @param assetId Registry identifier of the asset.\n     */\n    function withdrawProceeds(uint256 assetId) external whenNotPaused nonReentrant poolExists(assetId) {\n        VaulticAssetRegistry.AssetRecord memory rec = registry.getAsset(assetId);\n        if (msg.sender != rec.assetOwner) revert NotAssetOwner(assetId, msg.sender);\n\n        AssetInvestmentPool storage pool = _pools[assetId];\n        uint256 withdrawable = pool.proceedsCollected - pool.proceedsWithdrawn;\n        if (withdrawable == 0) revert NoProceeds(assetId);\n\n        pool.proceedsWithdrawn += withdrawable;\n\n        paymentToken.safeTransfer(msg.sender, withdrawable);\n\n        emit ProceedsWithdrawn(assetId, msg.sender, withdrawable);\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Sweeps accumulated protocol fees to feeTreasury. Owner-only.\n    function sweepProtocolFees() external onlyOwner nonReentrant {\n        uint256 amount = accumulatedFees;\n        if (amount == 0) revert NoProceeds(0);\n\n        accumulatedFees = 0;\n        paymentToken.safeTransfer(feeTreasury, amount);\n\n        emit FeesSweptToTreasury(feeTreasury, amount);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Updates the protocol fee rate. Owner-only; cap MAX_FEE_BPS.\n     * @param newFeeBps New fee in basis points.\n     */\n    function setProtocolFee(uint256 newFeeBps) external onlyOwner {\n        if (newFeeBps > MAX_FEE_BPS) revert FeeBpsExceedsMaximum(newFeeBps, MAX_FEE_BPS);\n        uint256 prev = protocolFeeBps;\n        protocolFeeBps = newFeeBps;\n        emit ProtocolFeeUpdated(prev, newFeeBps);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Updates the fee treasury address. Owner-only.\n     * @param newTreasury New treasury address.\n     */\n    function setFeeTreasury(address newTreasury) external onlyOwner {\n        if (newTreasury == address(0)) revert ZeroAddressArgument(\"feeTreasury\");\n        feeTreasury = newTreasury;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Updates the token implementation for future proxy deploys. Owner-only; does not upgrade existing proxies.\n     * @param newImplementation New implementation address.\n     */\n    function setTokenImplementation(address newImplementation) external onlyOwner {\n        if (newImplementation == address(0)) revert ZeroAddressArgument(\"tokenImplementation\");\n        address prev = tokenImplementation;\n        tokenImplementation = newImplementation;\n        emit TokenImplementationUpdated(prev, newImplementation);\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Pauses purchases, relists, and withdrawals.\n    function pause() external onlyOwner {\n        _pause();\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Unpauses the contract.\n    function unpause() external onlyOwner {\n        _unpause();\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Returns the investment pool state for the current round.\n     * @param assetId Asset to query.\n     * @return pool Full AssetInvestmentPool struct.\n     */\n    function getInvestmentPool(\n        uint256 assetId\n    ) external view poolExists(assetId) returns (AssetInvestmentPool memory pool) {\n        pool = _pools[assetId];\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Returns gross cost, fee, and net cost for a prospective purchase.\n     * @param assetId Asset to price.\n     * @param shareAmount Number of shares.\n     * @return grossCost Gross payment tokens required.\n     * @return fee Protocol fee component.\n     * @return netCost Net proceeds (grossCost \u2212 fee).\n     */\n    function quotePurchase(\n        uint256 assetId,\n        uint256 shareAmount\n    ) external view poolExists(assetId) returns (uint256 grossCost, uint256 fee, uint256 netCost) {\n        AssetInvestmentPool storage pool = _pools[assetId];\n        grossCost = uint256(pool.pricePerShare) * shareAmount;\n        fee = (grossCost * protocolFeeBps) / BPS_DENOMINATOR;\n        netCost = grossCost - fee;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Returns remaining unsold shares for the current round.\n     * @param assetId Asset identifier.\n     * @return available Remaining shares.\n     */\n    function availableShares(uint256 assetId) external view poolExists(assetId) returns (uint256 available) {\n        AssetInvestmentPool storage pool = _pools[assetId];\n        available = pool.totalShares - pool.soldShares;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Returns shares held by an investor for an asset (current round only).\n     * @param assetId Asset identifier.\n     * @param investor Investor address.\n     * @return shares Share count.\n     */\n    function getInvestorHoldings(uint256 assetId, address investor) external view returns (uint256 shares) {\n        shares = investorHoldings[assetId][investor];\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Returns withdrawable net proceeds for the asset owner.\n     * @param assetId Asset identifier.\n     * @return amount Withdrawable payment token units.\n     */\n    function withdrawableProceeds(uint256 assetId) external view poolExists(assetId) returns (uint256 amount) {\n        AssetInvestmentPool storage pool = _pools[assetId];\n        amount = pool.proceedsCollected - pool.proceedsWithdrawn;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Returns the list of investor addresses for the current round (used for reclaimAllShares).\n     * @param assetId Asset identifier.\n     * @return list Array of investor addresses.\n     */\n    function getInvestorList(uint256 assetId) external view returns (address[] memory list) {\n        list = _investorList[assetId];\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Deploys an EIP-1167 minimal proxy clone of tokenImplementation.\n     * @return proxy Address of the deployed proxy.\n     */\n    function _deployTokenProxy() internal returns (address proxy) {\n        address impl = tokenImplementation;\n\n        assembly {\n            let ptr := mload(0x40)\n            mstore(ptr, 0x3d602d80600a3d3981f3363d3d373d3d3d363d73000000000000000000000000)\n            mstore(add(ptr, 20), shl(96, impl))\n            mstore(add(ptr, 40), 0x5af43d82803e903d91602b57fd5bf30000000000000000000000000000000000)\n            proxy := create(0, ptr, 55)\n        }\n\n        if (proxy == address(0)) revert ZeroAddressArgument(\"tokenProxy\");\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev UUPS hook; restricts upgrades to owner.\n     * @param newImplementation New implementation address.\n     */\n    function _authorizeUpgrade(address newImplementation) internal override onlyOwner {} // solhint-disable-line no-empty-blocks\n}\n","keccak256":"0xd0ba944565d489a506299728f891fbd2745306beef9400606ad7af3a8238a1a6","license":"MIT"}},"version":1}

AddressEmptyCode(address).details: There's no code at `target` (it is not a contract).

AddressInsufficientBalance(address).details: The ETH balance of the account is not enough to perform the operation.

ERC1967InvalidImplementation(address).details: The `implementation` of the proxy is invalid.

ERC1967NonPayable().details: An upgrade function sees `msg.value > 0` that may be lost.

EnforcedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is paused.

ExpectedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is not paused.

FailedInnerCall().details: A call to an address target failed. The target may have reverted.

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

SafeERC20FailedOperation(address).details: An operation with an ERC20 token failed.

UUPSUnauthorizedCallContext().details: The call is from an unauthorized context.

UUPSUnsupportedProxiableUUID(bytes32).details: The storage `slot` is unsupported as a UUID.

Initialized(uint64).details: Triggered when the contract has been initialized or reinitialized.

Paused(address).details: Emitted when the pause is triggered by `account`.

Unpaused(address).details: Emitted when the pause is lifted by `account`.

Upgraded(address).details: Emitted when the implementation is upgraded.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

params.paymentAmount: Gross payment in payment token units (must equal shareAmount × pricePerShare).

params.assetId: Registry identifier of the CLOSED asset.
params.newInvestorCap: Per-investor cap for the new round (0 = uncapped).
params.newPricePerShare: Price per share for the new round.
params.newTotalShares: Total share supply for the new round.
params.newValuation: Updated USD valuation for the new round.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.assetId: Registry identifier of the asset to tokenize.

returns.tokenProxy: Address of the deployed token proxy.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

devdoc.title: VaulticInvestmentManager

availableShares(uint256).notice: Returns remaining unsold shares for the current round.

getInvestmentPool(uint256).notice: Returns the investment pool state for the current round.

getInvestorHoldings(uint256,address).notice: Returns shares held by an investor for an asset (current round only).

getInvestorList(uint256).notice: Returns the list of investor addresses for the current round (used for reclaimAllShares).

purchaseShares(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Purchases fractional shares of a TOKENIZED asset. paymentAmount must equal shareAmount × pricePerShare.

quotePurchase(uint256,uint256).notice: Returns gross cost, fee, and net cost for a prospective purchase.

relistAsset(uint256,uint128,uint128,uint.notice: Lets full owner (100% ERC20 supply) relist a CLOSED asset for a new round. Atomic: verify, reclaim, transfer ownership, relist, record tokenization, reset pool.

setFeeTreasury(address).notice: Updates the fee treasury address. Owner-only.

setProtocolFee(uint256).notice: Updates the protocol fee rate. Owner-only; cap MAX_FEE_BPS.

setTokenImplementation(address).notice: Updates the token implementation for future proxy deploys. Owner-only; does not upgrade existing proxies.

sweepProtocolFees().notice: Sweeps accumulated protocol fees to feeTreasury. Owner-only.

tokenizeAsset(uint256,uint128,uint128,ui.notice: Deploys a fractional ownership token proxy for an ACTIVE FRACTIONAL asset and records it on the registry. Owner-only.

withdrawProceeds(uint256).notice: Withdraws accumulated net proceeds for the registered asset owner. Pull-over-push; current round only.

withdrawableProceeds(uint256).notice: Returns withdrawable net proceeds for the asset owner.

userdoc.notice: Orchestrates fractional asset tokenization, purchases, proceeds, and full-owner relisting. Holds TOKENIZER_ROLE on the registry.
